Directory-first redesign

Find the right AI tool before your stack gets noisy.

A curated discovery layer for AI assistants, coding agents, automation products, image tools, video generators, and operator workflows. Search fast, compare the shortlist, and save what is worth deeper evaluation.

Browse all tools Submit your tool
What changed

The site now behaves like a real product directory: dynamic search, category filtering, shortlist actions, newsletter capture, and tool submissions backed by API state.

Editorial over noise
Featured tools, role-based collections, and clear pricing signals.
Shortlist workflow
Save tools while browsing and return later with context intact.
Supply-side funnel
Collect newsletter leads and tool submissions without a full CMS.

Browse by category

Start with the surface that matches the job to be done, then narrow by pricing, verification, and editorial fit.

Featured picks

High-confidence starting points for most users. These are the tools we would put on a first-pass shortlist today.

Trending this week

Momentum tools worth checking now, ordered by internal trend score, product interest, and editorial recency.

Editorial collections

Role-based stacks that help users move from vague exploration to a tighter evaluation plan.

Your shortlist

Saved tools should feel like a working list, not just a counter in the navbar. Use this section to return to candidates worth deeper review.

Keep exploring
Weekly shortlist

Get the operator-grade AI tools digest.

One concise weekly email: what is worth testing, what is overhyped, and which tools are trending by role and category.

Supply side

Have a tool worth listing?

Use the submission flow to send your product for editorial review. The new backend stores submissions so the front page can evolve without hardcoded HTML edits.
